Are There Activation Fees?
Understand all account-related fees, activation fee structure, and when fees apply.

April 2, 2026

There are no activation fees for Tradeify accounts.

- Growth Evaluations: No activation fee

- Select Evaluations: No activation fee

- Lightning Funded: One-time purchase, no additional activation fee

When you pass an evaluation, your funded account is activated automatically with no additional fees required.
